nasb.text: Then David said to him, “How is it you were not afraid to stretch out your hand to destroy the Lord’s anointed?”

esv.text: David said to him, “How is it you were not afraid to put out your hand to destroy the Lord’s anointed?”

cnv.text: 大衛對他說：“你伸手毀滅耶和華的受膏者，怎麼還不懼怕呢？”

ccb.text: 大卫说：“你怎么敢下手杀耶和华所膏立的王？
